title: Emergency symptoms
content: Severe chest pain, low oxygen saturation, severe breathing difficulty, confusion, fainting, or stroke-like symptoms require emergency escalation.

title: Triage disclaimer
content: The system is a decision support assistant and does not replace a licensed medical professional.

title: Patient analytics
content: Healthcare dashboard tracks triage levels, oxygen saturation, symptom groups, age bands, and chronic-condition risk.

title: Routine care
content: Mild stable symptoms without red flags may be categorized as routine, but worsening symptoms require reassessment.
